> **Before submitting:** please search [existing issues](https://github.com/harshdwivediiiii/pathfinder-ai/issues) to make sure this bug hasn't already been reported.

---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is and where it occurs.

---

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See the error

---

## Expected vs. Actual Behavior

| | Description |
|---|---|
| **Expected** | What did you expect to happen? |
| **Actual** | What actually happened instead? |

---

## Environment Info

- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17)
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Node.js Version:** (run `node -v`)

---

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots, screen recordings, or error logs to help explain the problem.

<details>

Paste any relevant error output here

### Difficulty

Check the level that best describes this bug's complexity:

- [ ] `level:beginner` — straightforward fix, good for first-time contributors
- [ ] `level:intermediate` — requires some familiarity with the codebase
- [ ] `level:advanced` — complex issue needing deep understanding
- [ ] `level:critical` — urgent, blocks development or affects many users
